runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.22) when fourth over 520m at Wanganui in a Class 5 H. Has two wins and two placings from six starts from the draw. Key chance and should go close.

runners.formComment: Good effort last time when third (30.40) over 525m at this track. Has a low draw. Danger with even luck.

runners.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last outing finished 5th over 457m at Ascot Park beaten 4 lengths (26.64) behind Chilly Pepper in a Class 3/4 on March 31. Can measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last outing finished 5th over 457m at Ascot Park beaten 4 lengths (26.64) behind Chilly Pepper in a Class 3/4 on March 31. Can measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Interference in early stages checked off heels.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wanganui (30.62) in a Class 5 H, finishing a 11 length sixth. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minors. Will need some luck to feature.

runners.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior he recorded a useful 26.09 over 457m finishing second at Ascot Park. Leading contender.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.66) at this track in a Class 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and six places from 15 starts. Can't recommend against this lot.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (26.32) at Ascot Park in a Class 5, finishing fourth and beaten 4 lengths. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.

runners.formComment: Was the fastest winner on the program after leading to make it back-to-back wins at Ascot Park over 390m (22.28). Go close.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 525m at this track. Others favoured this time.
